description.overview: An ancient Japanese hunting breed, the Kishu Ken is a dignified, loyal dog. They're quiet, clean, and devoted to their families but can be reserved with strangers.
description.history: The Kishu Ken originated in Japan.
description.temperament: Known for being loyal, docile, alert.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, dense double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

best_for: Those wanting a calm Japanese breed
verdict.summary: An ancient Japanese hunting breed, the Kishu Ken is a dignified, loyal dog. They're quiet, clean, and devoted to their families but can be reserved with strangers.
